title: 8 Herbal Essential Oils For Cough
description: Eucalyptus globulus essential oils contains several bioactive constituents, including eucalyptol, limonene, and alpha-pinene. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties, which can help to relieve coughs caused by congestion. Eucalyptol, in particular, is known for its expectorant properties, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the airways.
